eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land up to 2 hectares.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 directly to bank accounts.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
eligibility: Poor, deprived rural families and identified occupational category of urban workers' families as per SECC 2011 data.
benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

scheme_name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
eligibility: Adult members of any rural household willing to do public work-related unskilled manual work.
benefits: At least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year.
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development

eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS), Low Income Group (LIG) and Middle Income Group (MIG) families residing in urban areas.
benefits: Credit-linked subsidy on home loans, financial assistance for house construction/upgradation.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

eligibility: Rural families who are houseless or living in zero, one or two room houses with kutcha wall and kutcha roof.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly areas for house construction.
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development

eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years of age.
benefits: Zero-balance savings bank account, RuPay Debit card, accident insurance cover of ₹2 lakh, overdraft facility up to ₹10,000.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: Adult woman belonging to a BPL family, SC/ST, PMAY households, Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY).
benefits: Financial support of ₹1,600 for LPG connection to BPL households.
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

eligibility: Farmers, individual/joint borrowers who are owner cultivators, tenant farmers, self-help groups.
benefits: Short-term credit limits for crop production, post-harvest expenses, consumption requirements.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

scheme_name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
eligibility: Street vendors vending before March 24, 2020, with certificate of vending/identity card.
benefits: Collateral-free working capital loan of up to ₹10,000 with 7% interest subsidy.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

eligibility: Citizens of India between 18-40 years of age with a savings bank account.
benefits: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension between ₹1,000 and ₹5,000 after the age of 60.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
eligibility: Citizens between 18 and 50 years of age with a bank account.
benefits: Life cover of ₹2 lakh for a premium of ₹436 per annum.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: Citizens between 18 and 70 years of age with a bank account.
benefits: Accident insurance cover of ₹2 lakh for death/disability for a premium of ₹20 per annum.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: BPL citizens aged 60 years or older.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹200 (₹500 for age >80). State govts may add more.
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development

eligibility: Families with girl children.
benefits: Welfare services focused on survival, protection, and education of girl child (no direct DBT).
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

eligibility: Parents or legal guardians of a girl child below 10 years of age.
benefits: High-interest savings account for girl child's education and marriage expenses (tax benefits under 80C).
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: Indian youth (school/college dropouts or unemployed).
benefits: Free skill training, certification, and placement assistance.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

scheme_name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
eligibility: Rural youth between 15 and 35 years of age from poor families.
benefits: Placement-linked skill training.
required_documents: BPL Ration Card or SECC inclusion details
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development

eligibility: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs above 18 years for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: Any individual above 18 years of age. At least VIII standard pass for projects costing above ₹10 lakh in manufacturing.
benefits: Credit-linked subsidy for setting up new micro-enterprises.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in a notified area, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers.
benefits: Comprehensive insurance cover against failure of crops due to non-preventable natural risks.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

eligibility: Any non-corporate, non-farm small/micro-enterprise seeking a business loan up to ₹10 lakh.
benefits: Collateral-free business loans under Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (up to ₹5 lakh), and Tarun (up to ₹10 lakh) categories.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: Any Indian citizen between 18 and 70 years of age.
benefits: Market-linked pension scheme with tax benefits up to ₹2 lakh per year under Section 80CCD.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: Resident Indian individuals, HUFs, trusts, universities, and charitable institutions.
benefits: Government securities denominated in grams of gold. Interest rate of 2.5% per annum on initial investment value.
ministry: Ministry of Finance

eligibility: Traditional artisans and craftspeople working with hands and tools in 18 specified trades.
benefits: Skill verification, toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, collateral-free enterprise development loans up to ₹3 lakh.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

scheme_name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY)
eligibility: Valid ration card holders (Yellow, Orange, Antyodaya, Annapurna) residing in Maharashtra.
benefits: Cashless hospitalization and tertiary medical care cover up to ₹5 lakh per family per year in empanelled hospitals.
ministry: Government of Maharashtra - Department of Health

eligibility: Destitute old age persons, disabled, blind, orphans, widows, and people with critical illnesses in Maharashtra.
benefits: Monthly pension support of ₹1,000 to ₹1,500 directly transferred to bank accounts.
ministry: Government of Maharashtra - Social Justice Department

scheme_name: Chief Minister Employment Generation Programme (CMEGP) Maharashtra
eligibility: Entrepreneurs between 18 and 45 years (up to 50 for reserved) setting up new industrial units in Maharashtra.
benefits: Subsidies ranging from 15% to 35% on project costs up to ₹50 lakh for manufacturing and ₹10 lakh for service units.
ministry: Government of Maharashtra - Industry Department

eligibility: Women heads of households residing in Karnataka with valid ration cards (BPL/APL).
benefits: Monthly financial assistance of ₹2,000 directly deposited to the beneficiary's bank account.
ministry: Government of Karnataka - Department of Women and Child Development

eligibility: Domestic electricity consumers in Karnataka with average monthly consumption under 200 units.
benefits: Free electricity up to a maximum of 200 units per month.
ministry: Government of Karnataka - Energy Department

eligibility: Unemployed graduates and diploma holders of Karnataka who completed their courses in the current academic year.
benefits: Monthly allowance of ₹3,000 for graduates and ₹1,500 for diploma holders for up to 2 years.
ministry: Government of Karnataka - Department of Skill Development

eligibility: BPL and Antyodaya cardholders residing in Karnataka.
benefits: 10 kg of food grains per person per month (or cash equivalent at ₹34/kg in lieu of the additional 5 kg).
required_documents: Aadhar Card linked to Ration Card
ministry: Government of Karnataka - Food and Civil Supplies Department

eligibility: Permanent residents of Uttar Pradesh with a maximum annual family income of ₹3 lakh and up to two girls per family.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹15,000 in six phases from birth till entry into higher education degrees.
ministry: Government of Uttar Pradesh - Women and Child Development

eligibility: Unemployed youth of Uttar Pradesh aged between 18 and 40 years with at least a High School pass certificate.
benefits: Subsidy-linked loan up to ₹25 lakh for manufacturing units and ₹10 lakh for service industries.
ministry: Government of Uttar Pradesh - Department of Industries

eligibility: Unemployed youths or dairy farmers in Uttar Pradesh owning at least 10 milch cattle (cows/buffaloes).
benefits: Bank loan assistance up to ₹9 lakh for setting up dairy farms with interest subsidies.
ministry: Government of Uttar Pradesh - Animal Husbandry Department

eligibility: Girl child born in Delhi to parents residing in Delhi for at least 3 years with annual family income under ₹1 lakh.
benefits: Financial deposits of up to ₹20,000 at various educational milestones, redeemable on attaining 18 years of age.
ministry: Government of Delhi - Department of Social Welfare

eligibility: Domestic electricity consumers in Delhi with monthly consumption up to 200 units.
benefits: 100% subsidy on electricity bills for consumption up to 200 units, and 50% subsidy for consumption between 201 and 400 units.
ministry: Government of Delhi - Power Department

eligibility: Senior citizens (aged 60 years or older) residing in Delhi with annual family income under ₹3 lakh.
benefits: Free pilgrimage travel, boarding, lodging, and logistics support to major spiritual centers in India.
ministry: Government of Delhi - Revenue Department

eligibility: BPL families and lower-middle-class families (annual income under ₹4 lakh) residing in Gujarat.
benefits: Cashless quality medical care cover up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for critical illness surgeries.
ministry: Government of Gujarat - Health and Family Welfare

eligibility: Gujarat students who secured 80 percentile or more in board exams with annual family income under ₹6 lakh.
benefits: Scholarship up to 50% of tuition fees or ₹2 lakh per year for professional college courses, and hostel allowance.
ministry: Government of Gujarat - Education Department

eligibility: Girls belonging to Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Socially and Educationally Backward Classes in Gujarat.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹12,000 given to the girl's parents at the time of marriage to offset wedding expenses.
required_documents: Aadhar Card of girl and father
ministry: Government of Gujarat - Social Justice and Empowerment Department

scheme_name: Delhi Mukhyamantri Old Age & Disability Pension
eligibility: Senior citizens (aged 60+) and differently-abled individuals residing in Delhi for at least 5 years.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹2,000 to ₹2,500 transferred directly to bank accounts.
ministry: Government of Delhi - Department of Social Welfare

scheme_name: UP Old Age & Widow Pension Scheme
eligibility: Senior citizens (60+) and destitute widows living below the poverty line in Uttar Pradesh.
benefits: Monthly pension support of ₹1,000 directly deposited to bank accounts.
ministry: Government of Uttar Pradesh - Department of Social Welfare

eligibility: Any resident of Maharashtra seeking primary healthcare.
benefits: Free medical checkups, essential medicines, diagnostic tests, and health consultations at neighborhood clinics.
required_documents: Aadhar Card or any valid photo ID
ministry: Government of Maharashtra - Public Health Department

eligibility: Unemployed individuals, street vendors, and home businesses in Gujarat seeking self-employment resources.
benefits: Free structural business kit/tools along with financial loan subsidy support up to ₹10,000.
ministry: Government of Gujarat - Department of Labour and Employment
